subject: [DCAEGEN2] Change AAI variable syntax in PRH
commit_message:
[DCAEGEN2] Change AAI variable syntax in PRH

- Change AAI URL syntax in config
- Top up PRH container to 1.7.0.
- Top up bootstrap container to 3.3.3.

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2863
Signed-off-by: Tomasz Wrobel <tomasz.wrobel@nokia.com>
Change-Id: Idff98a11cb0418e5c327251e04de2bd202f79315

Patch Set 5: Code-Review+1

PNFRegistration smoke test looks good, and this is the only one, which uses PRH component.
I think, we`re good to merge this. I don`t want to wait for Vijay`s +1 - this will slow this MR down - as we have a PRH bug to be corrected next. That PRH BugFix depends on this MR, which needs to be done first.

Patch Set 5: Code-Review+1

Change has been successfully merged by Krzysztof Opasiak
